description: An irritating mod made for april fools in a couple hours
body:
a small* mod, made a part of an april fools joke

- Chat is reversed

- 1.8's "wobble" shader is forced on

- items constantly swap


- `*` this was hastily thrown together in two hours for an april-fools mod jam among my friends.
if you really want motion sickness, you can!

also, if you're here... _why?_
